name: Fiddleheads Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp fresh chives, snipped, if available
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Let stand for at least one hour.
3. Pour the sauce over two cups of cooked (just tender) and chilled fiddleheads.
4. Garnish with two chopped boiled eggs.
